items.message: CI analysis complete — no new failures found. All recently merged PRs (#38247, #38246, #38176, #38259) have green CI check runs. The two open PRs with failing CI (#38228 compute SDK TypeSpec migration, #38232 storage-file-datalake TypeSpec migration) are unmerged and their failures are specific to those PRs' own massive TypeSpec-migration changes. The previously tracked event-hubs AggregateError failure (issue #38231) was fixed and closed on April 21. The known failures tracking issue (#37864) lists no pre-existing failures. No GitHub issue created.
